# ✅ Data Preprocessing Completed

## 📊 Summary of Work Done

✔ Successfully loaded and explored the dataset  
✔ Handled missing values using statistical methods  
✔ Converted timestamp into useful time-based features  
✔ Performed exploratory data analysis (EDA)  
✔ Visualized energy consumption patterns  
✔ Analyzed feature relationships using correlation matrix  
✔ Selected important features for modeling  
✔ Normalized data using MinMaxScaler  
✔ Created sequential data for LSTM model  

---

## 📁 Generated Files

The following files were successfully created:

- `models/scaler.pkl` → Data normalization model  
- `data/processed/X.npy` → Input sequences for LSTM  
- `data/processed/y.npy` → Target values  

---

## 📈 Dataset Ready for Modeling

The dataset is now:
- Clean ✅

- Time-series ready ✅
